{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321131505BA78C7E29045F0C01B57"}"},"total":23},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7610090524147008280","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"读过不下20本女尊类型的书，也算女尊小资历🤓，刚粗略的看了一下，作者文笔在这类书中算好的，其他书或多或少会有语言重复，情节冗杂，这本书看到目前还没，但是说实话女尊之类的书大多都是小黄书[舔屏]纯爽的，作者写的情节进展太快对人物塑造不够饱满，会导致后续虐情节略显突兀，作者可以稍微放缓点，多进行人物之间的情感交流，也为后续情节推进，人物行为做铺垫[盯]对于huang的部分细致描写虽然容易被封[捂脸]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771864653,"group_id":"7572226216111918105","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1ZGGObdYvhafglOjJ72pSiUi+umoyz7qMy3q/LI9YPI","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3705824321221193","user_name":"爱吃家常肥肠的李母"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3705824321221193","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7572226216111918105","book_info":{"abstract":"凤天大陆，女尊千年，男人天生就是玩物。 可洛家那位“第一美人”洛砚寒，却是个货真价实的男人！

他一朝被女帝识破身份，从此人生开挂式崩盘： 北原女帝阙瑶光：“朕的江山都给你，只要你乖乖躺平。” 太女顾玄鸾：“我可以为你做出一切，只要你只看我。” 师姐、师尊、狐族女王、龙族公主、魔尊…… 十二位顶尖女主，十二条锁链，十二场强制爱修罗场！

她们以为把他关在笼子里，就能永远拥有他。 却不知道， 温柔克制的洛砚寒，骨子里藏着一把最锋利的刀。

——《女尊：我被十二个女主逼到黑化》 （又名：女帝都得跪着求我别走）

标签：女尊 / 强制爱 / 权谋朝堂 / 男扮女装 / 养成系 / 追夫火葬场 / 多女主 / 顶级修罗场","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o962f926761d65af046723c7793b05de4~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"砚生一梦","author_id":"","book_id":"7572226216111918105","book_name":"女尊：绝美炉鼎体质，被女帝强取","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#302020","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"7308人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":378,"name":"女帝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=378&name=女帝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7572226674188616217","read_count":"7308","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"398683"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"189","tags":"历史古代,架空,玄幻,多女主,女帝","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/8c7a226232590d227bc94355bb5c9981~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779254106&x-signature=KsXADj%2BHeiEjSjhYrA4uVTCuHd0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1095577385306727","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"6"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321131505BA78C7E29045F0C01B57"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":9,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":534},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_reply_time":1771887680,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7575935149299630873","common":{"comment_type":-90,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"19话开始女皇陛下如何痴缠男主，如何用权势碾碎男主为生民立命为男子证明的愿望，为了让男主更合口，施舍一点空间让男主做事施展才华，并适时收回，绝绝子了，忠君爱国的幻想被皇室母女打破，估计后面对亲情的珍视会被妹妹玩没，里面各种女人的爱没有是男主想要的，希望最后男主独美"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1763912640,"group_id":"7572226216111918105","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1515606460348504"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7572226216111918105","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"106"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":6497,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":10457,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7572707093122630425","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"文笔真好，干净利落，男主的形象立起来了，有配得上美貌的才华品行，才有资格让别人想沾染，想亵渎"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1763164453,"group_id":"7572226216111918105","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3FMwe58YtKyIyQ+NPo+s+9ljVQIJjL24Yy0Rz6BaSfW","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1515606460348504","user_name":"飘伞"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1515606460348504","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7572226216111918105","book_info":{"abstract":"凤天大陆，女尊千年，男人天生就是玩物。 可洛家那位“第一美人”洛砚寒，却是个货真价实的男人！

他一朝被女帝识破身份，从此人生开挂式崩盘： 北原女帝阙瑶光：“朕的江山都给你，只要你乖乖躺平。” 太女顾玄鸾：“我可以为你做出一切，只要你只看我。” 师姐、师尊、狐族女王、龙族公主、魔尊…… 十二位顶尖女主，十二条锁链，十二场强制爱修罗场！

她们以为把他关在笼子里，就能永远拥有他。 却不知道， 温柔克制的洛砚寒，骨子里藏着一把最锋利的刀。

——《女尊：我被十二个女主逼到黑化》 （又名：女帝都得跪着求我别走）
